One major downside, especially during this season, is the poor air conditioning. The AC in the building was not working properly, which made the shopping experience quite uncomfortable. Many customers would likely find this frustrating in the heat.

On a positive note, parking facilities are decent and manageable.

[{"Name":"Rajiv Bajaj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSw8OASX8lPePxnOYAYWhtsODaHm_bxnWlQnqhsEcw-XtjGkmNAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I moved to Calicut a few months ago and since then I have been looking for an outlet selling decent plus size clothing, which is a bit difficult to find here.
A friend shared the details of this place with me a few days ago so today I decided to check them out. I was definitely not disappointed.
They stock a decent collection of men's clothing, including plus size and the best part is that their pricing is quite reasonable.
When I reached the store was manned by Hashim, who was quite helpful and went out of his way to help me find what I was looking for. Although I had gone with the idea of buying one pair of clothes, I ended up buying 3 shirts and a formal trouser.
I also came across a good collection of casual trousers, tshirts and cargo pants as well as cargo shorts, which I have put on my wishlist for the next visit. I noticed that they stock shoes as well, though in limited quantity.
There is not much in terms of parking in the immediate vicinity so that may be a bit of a challenge, unless you visit by a two wheeler or public transport.
Overall a good experience with this store.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3RCVNopwk9iJhGb228MDAgy7XS0tS902pTI4EKBSDXF2S9wOA70EtKEKRPwUo451frsnvfIDdcNXRjwqAjaZ-Fq7K2GHc8Ceug0oxK2QIhO3R5Zf2fo5g8n3BtSME-yCmwTeZqMDVeAQED=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0opzI2OhAGSvHGVy2eCqdyUF5O9IO7qhVyrLp3VX3wzMkNk7Ptc7AE3fvdtnI0rzpPbMRMzewtmDdw9mA2YgDuuz4UMgADBv3MBxe7bYK2cqenYgeRiyhHBByvLgFGcUioKy25Om7C89w=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2ywYmUvaAnOzHDyqvgs8RwcQFDK_31jdygDJTTXDUQAnwL1cAYF74I9g-KbLFL5zL6HwEgPp60FYuGnZD-BSviSGy6hvdJH4X9rnoPvqgX3QII1gIr9ahaYyw2gEhivfO5F7KSyvpC4vM=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2f3KxYF2rDW6jDftef4F4o2tpuJXmphJE9y6_ONW0HzbWYlj1WaCNdtiKN268MEi4LoYQmvp-pyDHiH6iuK26bgfNWmTpgVINTiXfaSw-pFucmm6_L-4bDYQAhN5PCIoe4qopS_Nqw3b0=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3KJLWUbRQjGj2U9sk2_UAq12Hk1VXAGyojfAYfFAClRuVATwPUdewyv29L2E99Kygphy6nkddtEccIRmGpwpmYUS0I1spRdPsNmp3GKMDOSxltHj-DHMzGDhFCQHViMbIoE6sTiY9MCSg=k-no"],"When":"6 months ago","review_id":"Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0bmJHMVBWVFZrUm1sWmNURm9iVkpTVlc5bVRGRRAB","source":"Google","rating_scale":5,"rating_float":4,"author_url":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106630534323146717389/reviews?hl=en-GB","posted_at_unix_micros":1764002429568219,"updated_at_unix_micros":1764002429568219,"language":"en","translated_lang":"","text_original":"I moved to Calicut a few months ago and since then I have been looking for an outlet selling decent plus size clothing, which is a bit difficult to find here.
A friend shared the details of this place with me a few days ago so today I decided to check them out. I was definitely not disappointed.
They stock a decent collection of men's clothing, including plus size and the best part is that their pricing is quite reasonable.
When I reached the store was manned by Hashim, who was quite helpful and went out of his way to help me find what I was looking for. Although I had gone with the idea of buying one pair of clothes, I ended up buying 3 shirts and a formal trouser.
I also came across a good collection of casual trousers, tshirts and cargo pants as well as cargo shorts, which I have put on my wishlist for the next visit. I noticed that they stock shoes as well, though in limited quantity.
There is not much in terms of parking in the immediate vicinity so that may be a bit of a challenge, unless you visit by a two wheeler or public transport.
Overall a good experience with this store.","text_translated":"","reply_text_original":"Hi Rajiv,
Thank you so much for taking the 
time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review. We’re really glad to hear that you had a great experience at our calicut store and found the plus-size collection helpful.

It’s wonderful to know that Hashim could assist you well and help you find what you were looking for. We’re 
also happy that you liked our range of shirts, trousers and casual wear.  Your kind words truly motivate our team.

We appreciate your feedback about parking we will definitely keep this in mind to improve convenience for our customers.

Looking forwad to welcoming you again soon. Thank you once again for choosing us! 🙏🏻🩶

Team King Fox Clothing

I purchased three dresses for Eid, and one dress was kept at the counter for billing. After selecting the other dress. I went to pay and realised the one I had left at the counter was mistakenly given to someone else. The staff assured me that they would call the other customer, as their size had changed, and that I would receive the dress the next day. I agreed, but when I called the next day, they told me they had placed an order for the dress, and it would arrive in three days.
I told them that if it was difficult, I would select another dress, but they assured me they were following up, and the dress would arrive before Eid. I called again, and they confirmed it would arrive the next day. They said they would call me when it arrived. However, no one called, and when I tried to call them, no one answered the phone. I was extremely disappointed.
If they didn’t have the dress, they should have been upfront with me. Mistakes happen, but they kept telling me the dress had been ordered and would arrive tomorrow, giving me false hopes. I didn’t go back to the shop because I didn’t want to waste my time at such a dishonest place.

Pepper Grey has a great reputation, and I hope they don’t let shops like Velvet Women tarnish it. I had a very disappointing experience at Philipper Dress Shop in Calicut. The staff’s attitude was unprofessional and unfriendly right from the beginning. They lacked basic customer service skills and seemed uninterested in helping or addressing any concerns.

Moreover, the stitching work was far from satisfactory. The fitting was completely off, and despite giving clear instructions, they did not deliver what was promised. When I pointed out the issues, instead of accepting responsibility or offering a solution, the staff responded with arrogance and indifference.

While I was searching through the fabrics, one of the cardboard rolls containing around 5 meters of mul chandery fabric accidentally slipped and fell down. Unfortunately, I did not notice that a family was standing behind me, and the cardboard accidentally hit a lady’s finger.

The moment it happened, I immediately apologized and explained that it was completely unintentional. I admitted my mistake and sincerely said sorry. I truly understand that accidents like this can be upsetting, and I never intended to hurt or inconvenience anyone.

However, what hurt me deeply was the way the situation was handled afterward. The lady’s daughter started shouting at me loudly in front of customers and staff members. Even after nearly 20–30 minutes, she again approached me while I was selecting materials and continued shouting publicly. I was shocked and embarrassed by the situation.

What disappointed me even more was that none of the floor managers or staff members stepped forward to understand the issue, calm the situation, or offer any support. As a customer, I expected at least one staff member or manager to intervene professionally and handle the matter respectfully. Instead, I was left standing there feeling humiliated in front of everyone.

I would also like to mention that I had already apologized sincerely at the very beginning. If the family still felt upset, the matter could have been discussed calmly and respectfully in private. Publicly shouting at someone after they have admitted the mistake and apologized is very painful and disrespectful.

In all my life, I have never experienced such an uncomfortable situation while shopping. Accidents can happen to anyone, and this was never done intentionally. The same situation could happen to any customer, including their own family members. What matters most is how we treat each other afterward — with understanding, humanity, and respect.

I kindly request Thottatil management to ensure that every customer is treated equally and respectfully, regardless of the situation. Customers are not just people who pay money — every customer deserves value, dignity, support, and respectful treatment from both staff and management.

I hope this feedback will be taken positively and that better customer handling and support will be ensured in the future.","Images":null,"When":"a month ago","review_id":"Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tVdE5rTTRNelI2TlU0eGFYRXRiMDE0Vm1wS2RFRRAB","source":"Google","rating_scale":5,"rating_float":1,"author_url":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115079727144902959723/reviews?hl=en-GB","posted_at_unix_micros":1778736960530963,"updated_at_unix_micros":1778736960530963,"language":"en","translated_lang":"","text_original":"Yesterday, on 13/05/2026, I visited Thottatil with my friend to purchase materials. We are truly sorry that you had such an upsetting experience at our store. 

We clearly understand how distressing this might have felt, especially after you had immediately and sincerely  apologized for an accidental incident. While we understand that the situation was upsetting for the other customer as well, we are deeply sorry that you were left uncomfortable and unsupported afterwards. 

We are deeply concerned that our team did not step in with the care ,the reassurance and the sensitivity the situation required. Every customer deserves to be treated with dignity and consideration within our store. 

Please know that we have taken your feedback very seriously. We have already been having discussions with our team members on how to handle such situations with empathy ,and greater care and calm going forwards. 

We are genuinely sorry for the distress this incident has caused you and we are grateful that you shared this with us. If you are open to it, we would be honoured to welcome you back and to make sure you are truly taken care of in your next visit.

From the moment I walked in, I could sense that this wasn’t your run-of-the-mill boutique — there’s a clear emphasis on craftsmanship, quality, and thoughtful design.
The fabrics are lovely — soft, comfortable, breathable. You can tell that a lot of care has gone into choosing good materials.
I was impressed by the artisan touches: from the signature prints and natural dyes to the subtle design details. It gives the garments a sense of uniqueness and personality.
The selection is beautifully curated: you’ll find pieces that feel traditional yet contemporary — perfect if you’re looking for something rooted in culture but with a modern aesthetic.
The staff were friendly and attentive. They helped me navigate their collections without being pushy, which made the shopping experience relaxed and enjoyable. they clearly mention care instructions (especially for their hand-crafted or natural-dye pieces) and put emphasis on sustainability. It’s nice to see a brand mindful of both form and ethics.
If you’re looking for something a bit special — maybe a festive outfit, or a garment with character rather than a generic off-the-rack look I highly recommend Varali Clothing.
